summary: Read-only plan: choose #88951 as the best live canonical among this job's actionable open candidates. Keep #86241 open as related but not a duplicate because it reports a distinct hook-runner hot-reload handler-stacking failure. Existing-overlap #72176 remains contextual only and is not used as an actionable canonical in this job.

actions.reason: Among the remaining actionable open refs, #88951 has the freshest and broadest current evidence for the duplicate-message family and should be the canonical issue for this cluster's actionable subset.
Keep #86241 open as related because it has a distinct root-cause claim and reproduction surface. Closing it as a duplicate of #88951 would risk losing the hook-runner hot-reload failure mode.
